summary: Completed comprehensive full-stack testing of Tealor Mode lead generation system. All email capture functionality, PDF downloads, analytics tracking, and UI components working correctly. 100% backend API success rate and excellent frontend user experience across desktop and mobile.

Email list and statistics endpoints

Professional footer displays info@tealormode.com contact

Mobile responsive design (390x844 viewport tested)
